title: Heart failure follow-up
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

red_flags.text: Supports documentation of high-risk deterioration and clinician-led urgent referral or escalation without mapping dose-bearing treatment content.
red_flags.rationale: Supports clinician-decided safety-netting and referral documentation.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports documentation of high-risk deterioration and clinician-led urgent referral or escalation without mapping dose-bearing treatment content.

source.title: Cheshire and Merseyside Heart Failure Pathway

exact_section.heading: Red flags and urgent referral for worsening heart failure

examination.text: Supports clinical history and examination, NT-proBNP, echocardiography, ECG, chest X-ray, renal, thyroid, liver, lipid, glucose, blood count, and urinalysis review.
examination.rationale: Supports mapped ECG, oxygen, weight, natriuretic peptide, renal, electrolytes, blood count, echocardiogram, and chest-X-ray review.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports clinical history and examination, NT-proBNP, echocardiography, ECG, chest X-ray, renal, thyroid, liver, lipid, glucose, blood count, and urinalysis review.

source.title: Chronic heart failure in adults: diagnosis and management

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.2.1–1.2.12 — history, examination, natriuretic peptides, imaging, ECG, and laboratory tests

examination.text: Supports worsening breathlessness, orthopnoea or paroxysmal nocturnal dyspnoea, weight increase, oedema or abdominal distension, blood pressure, heart rate, oxygen saturation, JVP, pulmonary findings, and peripheral oedema documentation.
examination.rationale: Supports mapped dyspnoea, orthopnoea or PND, oedema, weight change, examination, presets, prompts, and history.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports worsening breathlessness, orthopnoea or paroxysmal nocturnal dyspnoea, weight increase, oedema or abdominal distension, blood pressure, heart rate, oxygen saturation, JVP, pulmonary findings, and peripheral oedema documentation.

source.title: Cheshire and Merseyside Heart Failure Pathway

investigations.text: Supports clinician-selected full blood count, renal and electrolyte tests, natriuretic peptide, liver and thyroid tests, ECG, and chest X-ray review.
investigations.rationale: Supports mapped worsening-heart-failure test fields already covered by NICE.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-selected full blood count, renal and electrolyte tests, natriuretic peptide, liver and thyroid tests, ECG, and chest X-ray review.

source.title: Cheshire and Merseyside Heart Failure Pathway

medication.text: Supports clinician-led medication review and monitoring of renal function, electrolytes, blood pressure, pulse, and ECG without autonomous prescribing or dose output.
medication.rationale: Supports mapped clinician-documented medication review without selecting a medicine or dose.
medication.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-led medication review and monitoring of renal function, electrolytes, blood pressure, pulse, and ECG without autonomous prescribing or dose output.

source.title: Chronic heart failure in adults: diagnosis and management

medication.text: Supports review of functional capacity, fluid status, rhythm, cognition, nutrition, medication, renal function, haemoglobin or iron status, deterioration, monitoring frequency, and support needs.

medication.evidence_extract: Supports review of functional capacity, fluid status, rhythm, cognition, nutrition, medication, renal function, haemoglobin or iron status, deterioration, monitoring frequency, and support needs.

source.title: Chronic heart failure in adults: diagnosis and management

referral.text: Supports regular primary-care review, record updates, medicine review, functional assessment, deterioration review, follow-up planning, and specialist access.

referral.evidence_extract: Supports regular primary-care review, record updates, medicine review, functional assessment, deterioration review, follow-up planning, and specialist access.

source_limitations: Children, acute treatment, salt or fluid advice, diuretic plans, broad clinician plans, and specific medication doses remain unsupported.
Chest-pain and syncope negatives are not mapped from the heart-failure-specific sections.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
